title: Fold-safe driver historical encodings
summary: Test smoothed out-of-fold encodings and frequency features for Driver and Driver-by-context combinations to capture driver/team-like latent strategy tendencies.
rationale: The Driver column is high-cardinality but all test drivers appear in training, and external notebooks emphasize driver feature engineering. A fold-safe driver prior may capture persistent strategy, car, or team effects not represented by raw telemetry columns.
implementation_hint: Create OOF-smoothed target encodings for Driver, Driver-Year, Driver-Compound, and Driver-Race only if fold groups prevent same-context leakage. Pair them with non-target counts and frequency encodings; compare target-encoded versus frequency-only driver blocks.
expected_effect: Small to medium AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Driver encodings are vulnerable to random-split leakage and memorization. Use smoothing, minimum-count fallback, and grouped validation by Race-Year or driver-race context.
